summary: Tested user-specific theme feature (6 themes: Slate/Ocean/Forest/Warm/Dark/Midnight). All 12 backend tests pass. All frontend visual verifications pass - swatches visible, correct sidebar colors, dark mode card overrides, theme persistence on reload, active nav color per theme, active swatch white ring indicator.

test_results.Theme persists after page reload (ocean): PASS - data-theme=ocean after reload, sidebar rgb(12,74,110)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: admin@test.local / Admin1234! (click 'Sign in with email & password' first). Theme feature fully working. 6 swatches in sidebar footer. Ocean=#0c4a6e, Forest=#14532d, Warm=#7c2d12, Dark=full dark mode with card #1e293b, Midnight=#1e1b4b. Themes persist via PUT /api/auth/preferences + GET /api/auth/me. Active swatch shows white ring. Active nav uses per-theme color.
